ddls:
CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_date" TEXT /* The date of the testing data entry */,
  "new_positives" INTEGER /* Number of new positive cases reported on the test date */,
  "cumulative_positives" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of positive cases up to the test date */,
  "total_tests_performed" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted on the test date */,
  "cumulative_tests_performed" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of tests conducted up to the test date */,
  "load_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was loaded into the system */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the testing site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the testing site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the testing site */,
  "anomaly_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if there are any anomalies in the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., manual entry, automated upload) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_date", "site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health officer, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing site */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the testing site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the testing site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)
